_meta.note: Numeric fields carry full JSON precision (source of truth: App_Data/*.json — re-verified against source CSVs 2026-07-11, 0 mismatches). display_* fields are the exact strings the app renders. summary is exact #summaryText innerHTML. cid drives the render: App_Data/Anchor_Renders/<Folder>/anchor_<cid zero-padded to 2>.webp?v=<RENDER_V>. Toggle contract (changed since the April captures): stdToggle is ENABLED iff row.cen (user may flip CEN<->NFRC); NFRC-only rows are LOCKED to NFRC; CEN rows default to CEN display. Changes vs April goldens: A13 values moved with the dataset swap and its summary changed twice (no more registered-mark, inner lite now reads Starphire per the all-Starphire display fix); A9 toggle went locked->enabled.

A1.description: C366 / Clear / 6mm outer / 6mm inner — NFRC (Enthermal default seed)

A9.description: LUMI / Clear / 4mm outer / 4mm inner — CEN row (defaults to CEN display, toggle ENABLED)

A13.description: SB72 / Starphire / 6mm outer / 4mm inner — NFRC, all-Starphire assembly (6mm only)
A13.summary: Solarban 72 on Starphire on 6mm outboard and Starphire 4mm inboard.

D1.description: Plus Inboard seed default: mono 4mm C366 (S2), VIG 4/4 C366 on S4, Ar90 — NFRC

E1.description: Plus Outboard seed default: VIG 5/5 C366 (S2), mono 4mm, C366 on S5, Ar90 — NFRC
